passages.passage_text:
A teacher's training institute has to conduct a refresher course for teachers of seven different subjects. History, Geography, Political Science, Hindi, Sanskrit, Music and English from 12th December to 19th, December.
I. The course should start with Geography.
II. 13th December being a Sunday, should be a holiday.
III. Music should be on the day previous to English.
IV. The course should end with History.
V. Political Science should be immediately after the holiday. Sanskrit follows Political Science.
VI. There should be a gap of one day between Sanskrit and English and between Music and Hindi.

There are six soccer teams A, B, C, D, E and F in the soccer league game. All the six teams play each Saturday during the season. Each team must play against each of the other teams once and only once during the seasons.
I. Team A plays against team D 1st and team F 2nd.
II. Team B plays against team E 1st and team C 3rd.
III. Team C plays against team F 1st.

A sales representative plans to visit each of six companies - M, N, P, Q, R and S exactly once during the course of one day. She is setting up her schedule for the day according to the following conditions.
I. She must visit M before N and before R.
II. She must visit N before Q.
III. The 3rd company she visits must be P.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What day does Rakesh make his presentation on?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which subject is followed by Music?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: How many days gap is there between Music and Political Science?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which subject will be on Tuesday?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which refresher course will start three days before English subject?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: On 1st Saturday, which of the following pairs of teams play against each other?

choices.a: A and B, C and F, D and E
choices.b: A and B, C and E, D and F
choices.c: A and C, B and E, D and F

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following team must B play second with?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: What is the total number of games that each team must play during the season?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If D wins 5 games, which of the following must be true?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The last set of games could be between

choices.a: A and B, C and F, D and E
choices.b: A and C, B and F, D and E
choices.c: A and D, B and C, E and F

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Which of the following could be the order in which sales representative visits the six companies?

choices.a: M, R, N, Q, P, S
choices.b: M, S, P, N, R, Q
choices.c: P, R, M, N, Q, S
choices.d: P, S, M, R, Q, N
